section.heading: Regulations
section.chapeau: The Secretary of the Treasury shall prescribe such regulations as may be necessary to carry out—

paragraph.content: subsections (a) through (n) of section 4033 of this title;
the amendment made by section 204; 11 See References in Text note below. and
any proclamation issued under section 4033(o) of this title.

note.heading: Termination of Section
note.p: For termination of section by section 107(d) of Pub. L. 109–53, see Effective and Termination Dates note below.

note.heading: References in Text
note.p: Section 204, referred to in par. (2), is section 204 of Pub. L. 109–53, which amended section 58c of this title.

note.heading: Effective and Termination Dates
note.p: Section effective on the date the Dominican Republic-Central America-United States Free Trade Agreement enters into force (Mar. 1, 2006) and to cease to have effect on the date the Agreement ceases to be in force with respect to the United States, and, during any period in which a country ceases to be a CAFTA–DR country, to cease to have effect with respect to such country, see section 107 of Pub. L. 109–53, set out as a note under section 4001 of this title.
